mapper.sql: id, plan_id, student_id, study_date, stage_name, day_index, stage_day_index, status, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert:
insert into student_learning_calendar (plan_id, student_id, study_date, stage_name, day_index, stage_day_index, status, created_at, updated_at) values
(#{item.planId}, #{item.studentId}, #{item.studyDate}, #{item.stageName}, #{item.dayIndex}, #{item.stageDayIndex}, #{item.status}, #{item.createdAt}, #{item.updatedAt})
mapper.select: select from student_learning_calendar where plan_id = #{planId} order by study_date asc, id asc
